name: PM SVANidhi
target_description: Street vendors with Certificate of Vending, survey identification, or Letter of Recommendation from ULB
ministry: Ministry of Housing and Urban Affairs (MoHUA)
data_source: PM SVANidhi scheme details from pmsvanidhi.mohua.gov.in and myscheme.gov.in

rules.description: Applicant must be a street vendor or hawker engaged in vending activities
rules.ambiguity_note: Must be street vendor. Category A/B: Certificate of Vending. Category C/D: Letter of Recommendation from ULB. No March 2020 cut-off — new vendors eligible via LoR route.

rules.description: Applicant must have an Aadhaar card
Applicant must have a bank account
For enhanced loans, prior loan must have been fully repaid
rules.ambiguity_note: For 2nd loan: must have fully repaid 1st. For 3rd: must have fully repaid 2nd.

required_documents.document: Certificate of Vending or Identity Card (Cat A-B) OR Letter of Recommendation from ULB (Cat C-D)
Aadhaar or Voter ID or Driving License

benefit_summary: 1st loan ₹10,000 (7% interest subsidy, 1-year repayment). On repayment: 2nd loan ₹20,000. On repayment: 3rd loan ₹50,000. Digital transaction cashback up to ₹100/month.

application_offices.find_instruction: Your city's municipal corporation or nagar palika office
Find the nearest CSC at locator.csccloud.in

description: Working capital loans for urban street vendors. First loan: ₹10,000 (repayable in 12 months). On timely repayment, enhanced loans: ₹20,000 then ₹50,000. No collateral required. Digital transactions earn an incentive of up to ₹1,200/year. Vendors must have a vendor certificate or letter of recommendation from ULB.
description_hindi: शहरी रेहड़ी-पटरी और फेरी वाले विक्रेताओं को बिना किसी गिरवी के ₹10,000 का कर्ज मिलता है। समय पर चुकाने पर ₹20,000, फिर ₹50,000 तक ऋण मिलता है। UPI/डिजिटल लेनदेन करने पर हर साल ₹1,200 तक का कैशबैक। नगर निगम का विक्रेता प्रमाण पत्र या सिफारिश पत्र ज़रूरी है।
